title: Forgot Your Lunch
prompt: You forgot your lunch today. What do you do?

choices.label: Buy school lunch for $4
choices.ledger_note: Bought lunch • Lawn Care: You stayed fueled, finished strong, and a neighbor asked you to add their yard next week.

job_preview.note: You stayed fueled, finished strong, and a neighbor asked you to add their yard next week.

lawn_care.note: You stayed fueled, finished strong, and a neighbor asked you to add their yard next week.

babysitting.note: Because you stayed dependable and prepared, another family asked you to babysit again.

dog_walking.note: Your dogs were calm, on time, and well cared for. A pet owner on the block asked you to add their dog to your route.

pet_sitting.note: Because you stayed dependable and prepared, another family asked you to book another pet-care visit.

choices.label: Buy a snack for $2
choices.ledger_note: Bought snack instead of lunch • Lawn Care: You ran low on energy and only finished part of one yard. That client paid half this week.

job_preview.note: You ran low on energy and only finished part of one yard. That client paid half this week.
job_preview.repeat_note: If this happens again before you recover, that client drops you and your weekly pay shrinks until you replace them.

lawn_care.note: You ran low on energy and only finished part of one yard. That client paid half this week.
lawn_care.repeat_note: If this happens again before you recover, that client drops you and your weekly pay shrinks until you replace them.

babysitting.note: Your energy and focus slipped during babysitting, so one family paid less this week.
babysitting.repeat_note: If this kind of problem keeps happening, a family may stop booking you.

dog_walking.note: Low energy or weak planning showed during your dog walks. One owner paid less this week because the service slipped.
dog_walking.repeat_note: If this happens again before you recover, that client drops you and your weekly pay shrinks until you replace them.

pet_sitting.note: Your energy and focus slipped during pet sitting, so one family paid less this week.
pet_sitting.repeat_note: If this kind of problem keeps happening, a family may stop booking pet care with you.

choices.label: Skip eating today
choices.ledger_note: Skipped lunch • Lawn Care: You had no energy for the full route and lost a client for the week.

job_preview.note: You had no energy for the full route and lost a client for the week.

lawn_care.note: You had no energy for the full route and lost a client for the week.

babysitting.note: The family noticed the issue and chose another sitter. Your babysitting pay stays lower until you book a new family.

dog_walking.note: The walk went poorly and a dog owner took their pet off your route. Your pay stays lower until you replace that client.

pet_sitting.note: The family noticed the issue and chose another pet sitter. Your pet sitting pay stays lower until you book a new family.

title: Friends Want Pizza
prompt: Your friends want pizza tonight. What do you do?

choices.label: Join in and spend $12
choices.ledger_note: Pizza night with friends • Lawn Care: Late night spending and low rest left you dragging on the mower route. You finished, but slower.

job_preview.note: Late night spending and low rest left you dragging on the mower route. You finished, but slower.

lawn_care.note: Late night spending and low rest left you dragging on the mower route. You finished, but slower.

babysitting.note: Your energy and focus slipped during babysitting, so one family paid less this week.

dog_walking.note: The walk was rough and your dog-walking pay took a hit this week.

pet_sitting.note: Your energy and focus slipped during pet sitting, so one family paid less this week.

choices.label: Go, but spend only $5
choices.ledger_note: Limited social spending • Lawn Care: You had fun and still kept enough control to show up ready for your clients.

job_preview.note: You had fun and still kept enough control to show up ready for your clients.

lawn_care.note: You had fun and still kept enough control to show up ready for your clients.

babysitting.note: No babysitting pay change this time, but the choice still matters.

dog_walking.note: No dog-walking pay change this time, but the choice still matters.

pet_sitting.note: No pet sitting pay change this time, but the choice still matters.

choices.label: Skip and save the money
choices.ledger_note: Skipped pizza outing • Lawn Care: You protected your budget and your rest. Clients noticed the steady work.

lawn_care.note: You protected your budget and your rest. Clients noticed the steady work.

dog_walking.note: You stayed sharp and handled your dog-walking route well. One owner added a bonus to this week's pay.
